summary:
Plan to fix 3 issues found in Saladin pipeline run:
1. Remove duplicate Scene Test from chapter_plan_pov.txt (causes Nguồn Gốc events to be incorrectly demoted)
2. Fix log '?' by looking up event_title from validated timeline instead of fix dict
3. Remove 'gap > 10 years' rule from validate and phase_plan prompts (creates thin bridging events that get demoted anyway)
